name: Oysters Bienville
recipeIngredient: 3 oz Oysters, (boiled until the edges curl), drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat 6 pie pans filled with rock salt.
2. Place boiled oysters in shells and cover each with 2 tablespoons of cold Bienville sauce.
3. Sprinkle the oysters with bread crumbs and grated Parmesan cheese.
4. Drizzle melted butter over the oysters to moisten them.
5. Place the oysters on cookie sheets and place under the broiler or in the oven until lightly browned and bubbly.
6. Arrange six oysters on each pre-heated pie pan with rock salt.
7. Serve immediately.
